overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, moving through a luxurious minimalist penthouse apartment with dark wood interiors and panoramic windows. The player discovers a deceased character in a suit lying on the floor, examines the body closely, then continues toward the window revealing a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury penthouse living area with minimalist furniture

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the spacious apartment, observing the modern interior design and furniture arrangement

entered.detail: panoramic glass windows spanning the far wall, revealing bright exterior light and city hints
dark wood slat ceiling with integrated recessed lighting strips
sleek black rectangular coffee table at the center of the seating area
white upholstered low seating cushions arranged around the table
large round mirror mounted on the far right wall reflecting the room
tall green bamboo plant in a dark planter adding natural element to the space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a luxurious, minimalist penthouse apartment with dark wooden floors and ceilings. The camera moves steadily forward through the spacious living area, revealing modern furniture including a low black table and white cushions. Large panoramic windows dominate the far wall, letting in bright natural light that contrasts with the dark interior tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: seating area near accent wall with LED lighting

events.description: deceased man in dark suit comes into view lying on the floor against the accent wall

agents.ego_description: moving toward the far wall where a body is discovered lying on the floor near the LED accent lighting

notable_agents.action: deceased elderly man in black suit lying motionless on the floor with visible cybernetic implants on his head

entered.detail: green glass bottle sitting on the low table
wine glass placed on the table surface
metal ice bucket with tongs on the table
dark textured wall with horizontal warm LED strip lighting at the base

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the living space, approaching the central coffee table where a bottle, glass, and ice bucket are arranged. As the camera rounds the table, a deceased man in a suit becomes visible lying against the far wall. The wall features distinctive horizontal LED accent lighting that illuminates the scene with a warm glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: area around the deceased character near the accent wall

agents.ego_description: circling around the deceased character on the floor, examining the body and cybernetic head implants from different angles

notable_agents.action: deceased man with distinctive cybernetic implants on his bald head, lying on his back with arms outstretched

segments.scene_description: The camera circles closely around the deceased character lying on the polished wooden floor, revealing details of his dark suit and cybernetic head implants. The warm LED strip lighting runs along the base of the textured wall behind him. As the camera moves, the furniture recedes into the background while the windows and city view become more prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic window corridor overlooking the city

events.description: moving past the deceased character toward the large windows, revealing the expansive futuristic cityscape

agents.ego_description: moving away from the body toward the panoramic windows to observe the sprawling cityscape outside

entered.detail: sprawling sci-fi cityscape visible through the windows featuring towering skyscrapers with distinctive spires and industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the deceased character toward the expansive panoramic windows, transitioning focus from the interior to the breathtaking exterior view. The futuristic cityscape dominates the view with towering skyscrapers and industrial spires visible against a clear sky. The space opens into a corridor-like area along the windows, with the wooden ceiling continuing overhead and a potted plant visible in the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious, minimalist penthouse that transitions from an intimate interior investigation to a sweeping view of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding across dark wooden floors and past modern furniture, moving through a spacious living area illuminated by bright natural light from distant panoramic windows. As the camera rounds a central coffee table with a bottle and ice bucket, the scene shifts toward a deceased man in a suit lying against a wall accented by warm LED lighting. The camera then circles closely around the body to reveal cybernetic implants before pulling away, allowing the interior furniture to recede as the focus shifts toward the glass. Finally, the movement carries past the body and into a corridor-like space, opening up to a breathtaking vista of towering skyscrapers and industrial spires under a clear sky.
